responses.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics and dialogue phonetics perfectly match the reference JSON guidelines and the song 'Flat out'.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference JSON for lyrics and spelling, with manual transcriptions for Chihaya's spoken introduction and outro.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal onset of speech and song. Instrumental gaps are kept clean with zero ghost subtitles. We ensured logical phrase splits for long lyric lines.

subtitles.original: はい、ということで
subtitles.english: So, anyway...

subtitles.original: 輪堂千速生誕祭、ここまで見てくれたみんな本当にありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much to everyone who has watched Chihaya Rindo's Birthday Festival up to this point!

subtitles.original: えー、次が本当にラストの曲です。
subtitles.english: So, next up is indeed the last song.

subtitles.original: この曲はいつかみんなと現地で会って、
subtitles.english: I hoped that we could sing this song at the very end when we eventually meet in person...

subtitles.original: ライブができた時に最後に歌えたらいいなって、そんな思いで、千速のいろんな気持ちを込めて作ってもらった曲です。
subtitles.english: ...and have a live concert, so it was made with many of Chihaya's feelings in mind.

subtitles.original: 千速の初めてのオリ曲、聴いてください。
subtitles.english: Please listen to Chihaya's very first original song.

subtitles.original: Flat out。
subtitles.english: \"Flat out\".

subtitles.original: メランコリーのリフレイン 午前三時
subtitles.english: A melancholy refrain at 3 AM.

subtitles.original: 夢を見るには少し遅すぎたMidnight
subtitles.english: Midnight was a little too late to dream.

subtitles.original: 言葉にならないままの想いが
subtitles.english: Before the feelings that won't turn into words...

subtitles.original: 溢れだしてしまう前に
subtitles.english: ...start to overflow,

subtitles.original: 飛び出した部屋
subtitles.english: I ran out of my room,

subtitles.original: 光を見たくて
subtitles.english: wanting to see the light.

subtitles.original: ”どうせ”だなんて何度だって諦めようとしたって
subtitles.english: Even if I tried to give up over and over again, saying \"it's useless anyway,\"

subtitles.original: だけどきっと今日もそっと伸ばした手 あの星まで
subtitles.english: I surely stretched my hand out gently to that star again today.

subtitles.original: 自分さえだませない嘘はもうやめて踏み込め
subtitles.english: Stop the lies that can't even fool yourself, and take a step forward!

subtitles.original: 駆け抜けて 音も風も抜き去って
subtitles.english: Run through, passing the sound and the wind,

subtitles.original: 迷いさえも振り切ってスピードを上げて
subtitles.english: shaking off even the hesitation, speed up!

subtitles.original: 行かなくちゃ 夜のまだその向こうへ
subtitles.english: I must go, beyond the night,

subtitles.original: 見たこともない世界へ
subtitles.english: to a world I've never seen,

subtitles.original: 今最高速度で
subtitles.english: now at top speed,

subtitles.original: 高鳴る方へ
subtitles.english: towards the thrumming!

subtitles.original: 答えなんてなくたってただこうしていたいだけ
subtitles.english: Even if there's no answer, I just want to stay like this,

subtitles.original: 未完成で完全な道の先まで 行ける信じて
subtitles.english: believing I can go to the end of this imperfect, perfect road.

subtitles.original: 差し障りないように生きた日々
subtitles.english: In the days lived to be harmless,

subtitles.original: 諦めの言い訳を探すのをやめて保存しよう
subtitles.english: stop looking for excuses to give up.

subtitles.original: もどかしい気持ち 窓の向こうに
subtitles.english: Frustrating feelings, beyond the window,

subtitles.original: 輝くあの星みたいになりたかったんだ
subtitles.english: I wanted to become like that shining star.

subtitles.original: 足りない物だらけだって どれだけ離されたって
subtitles.english: Even if I'm full of missing things, no matter how far I'm separated,

subtitles.original: 止まればそこまでなんだ
subtitles.english: if I stop, that's it!

subtitles.original: 進め 進め
subtitles.english: Go forward, go forward!

subtitles.original: 未来を変える瞬間はいつかじゃなくて今なんだ
subtitles.english: The moment to change the future is not someday, it's now!

subtitles.original: 進め 進め
subtitles.english: Go forward, go forward,

subtitles.original: 先へ さあ
subtitles.english: ahead, now!

subtitles.original: もっと遠くまで
subtitles.english: Even further...

subtitles.original: 確かめに行くんだ Flat out
subtitles.english: ...I will go to find out, Flat out!

subtitles.original: 駆け抜けて 夢に見たその舞台へ
subtitles.english: Run through, to that stage I saw in my dreams,

subtitles.original: 決して振り返らないでスピードを上げて保存しよう
subtitles.english: never looking back, speed up!

subtitles.original: 行かなくちゃ 夜のまだその向こうへ保存しよう
subtitles.english: I must go, beyond the night,

subtitles.original: 見たこともない世界へ
subtitles.english: to a world I've never seen,

subtitles.original: 今最高速度で保存しよう
subtitles.english: now at top speed,

subtitles.original: 信じる方へ
subtitles.english: towards what I believe!

subtitles.original: 答えなんてなくたってただこうして
subtitles.english: Even if there's no answer, just like this,

subtitles.original: 走り出したんだ 止まらないよ さあ
subtitles.english: I started running, I won't stop, now!

subtitles.original: あの星に届け
subtitles.english: reach that star!

subtitles.original: 輪堂千速生誕祭2026 見ていただいて本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for watching Chihaya Rindo's Birthday Festival 2026!

subtitles.original: これからもみんなと向こうの景色たくさん見に行きたいです！
subtitles.english: From now on, I want to go see many sights beyond with everyone!

subtitles.original: これからも千速のことを好きでいてついてきてくれたら嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if you keep loving Chihaya and follow along!

subtitles.original: 本当に今日はありがとうございましたー！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for today!

subtitles.original: ありがとうねー！
subtitles.english: Thank you!
